results.requirement_text: The system shall provide keyboard navigation for all primary form fields.

test_cases.title: Verify keyboard navigation across primary form fields
test_cases.objective: Confirm that keyboard navigation moves focus sequentially through all primary form fields as defined in the UI.
test_cases.technique_used: Tab key traversal across form fields
preconditions: Configured prerequisites for exercising keyboard navigation are available.

steps.action: Press the Tab key to move focus from the first primary form field to the next, repeating until the last primary form field is reached.
steps.expected_result: Focus moves sequentially to each primary form field in the order defined by the UI.

test_cases.expected_result: Keyboard navigation moves focus sequentially through all primary form fields.
assumptions: Primary form fields are defined in the UI and are focusable.

traceability.coverage_item: Verify that keyboard navigation (e.g., Tab key) moves focus sequentially through all primary form fields as defined in the UI.
traceability.technique_used: Tab key traversal across form fields

source_basis: keyboard navigation for all primary form fields

plans.requirement_text: The system shall provide keyboard navigation for all primary form fields.

coverage_items.rationale: Ensures the system meets the usability NFR for keyboard accessibility.
